rationale: Qodo free-tier limit notification is informational and contains no code feedback to address.
Replaced generic draft step payload records with specific Tool, Skill, and Preset payload interfaces with flexible index signatures.
Review summary only; its actionable type-safety feedback is tracked by review comment 3160855192.
Draft reconstruction now reads step.stepType before falling back to legacy step.type.
Preset draft hydration now preserves preset inputs in step preview state and reuses them when previewing the preset expansion.
Codex review body is informational; its actionable findings are tracked by review comments 3160875256 and 3160875268.
